description: The Menu. Browse freely. When you find what you need, present your Passport and order.

services.name: StayRight Hotels
services.description: Search and book hotel rooms worldwide. Find availability by city, dates, and preferences. Book rooms, view details, and manage cancellations.

actions.description: Search for available hotel rooms by city, dates, number of guests, and optional filters like max price and amenities. Returns a list of matching rooms with pricing.

required_inputs.name: city
required_inputs.description: City to search for hotels

required_inputs.name: check_in
required_inputs.description: Check-in date in ISO 8601 format

required_inputs.name: check_out
required_inputs.description: Check-out date in ISO 8601 format

required_inputs.name: guests
required_inputs.description: Number of guests (1-10)

actions.description: Get full details for a specific room including description, amenities, cancellation policy, and real-time pricing.

required_inputs.name: room_id
required_inputs.description: Unique room identifier from search results

example_response.description: Spacious king suite with city views, work desk, and rainfall shower.
example_response.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in

actions.description: Book a specific hotel room. Creates a confirmed reservation with a financial commitment. Sends confirmation email to the guest.

required_inputs.name: room_id
required_inputs.description: Room to book (from search results)

required_inputs.name: check_in
required_inputs.description: Check-in date in ISO 8601 format

required_inputs.name: check_out
required_inputs.description: Check-out date in ISO 8601 format

required_inputs.name: guest_name
required_inputs.description: Full name of the primary guest

required_inputs.name: guest_email
required_inputs.description: Contact email for booking confirmation

actions.description: Cancel an existing hotel booking. Cancellation policy applies — refund amount depends on timing relative to check-in date.

required_inputs.name: booking_id
required_inputs.description: Booking identifier from the original booking confirmation

services.name: QuickBite Delivery
services.description: Order food delivery from nearby restaurants. Browse menus, place orders, track deliveries, and manage cancellations. Delivers within 30 minutes in supported areas.

actions.description: Search available lunch options from nearby restaurants. Filter by cuisine, dietary preferences, price range, and delivery time. Returns menu items with pricing and estimated delivery.

required_inputs.name: delivery_address
required_inputs.description: Delivery address to find nearby restaurants

items.description: Grilled chicken breast, romaine, parmesan, house-made Caesar dressing, croutons

actions.description: Place a food delivery order. Creates a real order with financial commitment. Includes subtotal, delivery fee, tax, and optional tip.

required_inputs.name: items
required_inputs.description: Array of items to order, each with item_id and quantity

required_inputs.name: delivery_address
required_inputs.description: Full delivery address

required_inputs.name: contact_name
required_inputs.description: Name for the delivery

required_inputs.name: contact_phone
required_inputs.description: Phone number for delivery updates

actions.description: Get the current status and estimated arrival time for an active delivery order. Includes driver info and real-time status updates.

required_inputs.name: order_id
required_inputs.description: Order identifier from the order confirmation

example_response.status_message: Your driver is on the way

actions.description: Cancel a pending order that hasn't started preparation. Full refund if cancelled before preparation begins.

required_inputs.name: order_id
required_inputs.description: Order identifier from the order confirmation

services.name: FixRight Home
services.description: Find and book home service professionals — plumbing, electrical, cleaning, HVAC, handyman, painting, and landscaping. Search available providers, book appointments, reschedule, or cancel.

actions.description: Search for available home service providers by service type, location, urgency, and budget. Returns providers with ratings, pricing, and available time slots.

required_inputs.name: service_type
required_inputs.description: Type of service needed: plumbing, electrical, cleaning, hvac, handyman, painting, or landscaping

required_inputs.name: address
required_inputs.description: Address where the service is needed

actions.description: Book an appointment with a specific service provider at a selected time slot. Creates a confirmed service commitment with a service fee.

required_inputs.name: provider_id
required_inputs.description: Provider to book (from search results)

required_inputs.name: appointment_time
required_inputs.description: Selected time slot in ISO 8601 format (from provider's available_slots)

required_inputs.name: service_address
required_inputs.description: Address where the service is needed

required_inputs.name: contact_name
required_inputs.description: Name of the person at the service location

required_inputs.name: contact_phone
required_inputs.description: Phone number for the provider to call

required_inputs.name: problem_description
required_inputs.description: Description of the issue to be addressed
required_inputs.example: Kitchen faucet leaking from the base, constant drip

example_response.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 2 hours before appointment

actions.description: Move an existing appointment to a new time slot. The provider must have availability at the requested time.

required_inputs.name: appointment_id
required_inputs.description: Appointment identifier from the original booking

required_inputs.name: new_appointment_time
required_inputs.description: New desired appointment time in ISO 8601 format

example_response.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 2 hours before appointment

actions.description: Cancel a booked appointment. Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the appointment time. Refund amount depends on timing.

required_inputs.name: appointment_id
required_inputs.description: Appointment identifier from the original booking
